description_long: This is an electric kettle with a modern, cylindrical design, featuring a smooth, light blue and white body with a translucent dark brown upper section. The kettle has a prominent, ergonomic side-mounted handle in white and blue, and a spout for pouring on the opposite side. Measurement markings are visible on the body, indicating water levels, and the brand 'PROFILO' is printed near the base. The lid is domed and appears to be removable, with a small integrated knob for easy handling. A coiled white power cord is attached at the base, suggesting the kettle is powered electrically. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern electric kettle with a blue and white cylindrical body, translucent domed lid, ergonomic handle, and visible power cord. Features measurement markings and a spout for pouring.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spout, handle, measurement markings, and the 'PROFILO' logo, with the power cord coiled at the base.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full handle, lid knob, and the smooth, uninterrupted back surface without the spout.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying both the handle and spout, as well as the coiled power cord and the side profile of the kettle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the spout and the back of the kettle, with the power cord visible at the base.
attribute_lid_design: domed removable lid with integrated knob
